costs.cost: 2 G G W W U U

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return any number of target artifact cards with total mana value 10 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select any number of target artifact cards with total mana value 10 or less

params.Description: Creatures you control have vigilance and "{T}: Surveil 1." (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library You may put that card into your graveyard.)
